The '''Red Terror''' was an automated [[Law enforcement agency/Legends|police]] force that consisted of five hundred [[Warden 10-24 security droid]]s. When [[Brakiss]] took over the [[Droid/Legends|droid]] [[Factory/Legends|factory]] world of [[Telti/Legends|Telti]], he requested five hundred Warden 10-24s from [[Ulban Arms/Legends|Ulban Arms]] to provide security for the [[Moon/Legends|moon]].<ref name="EGTD" />

Each member of the Red Terror was painted scarlet, and the five hundred-strong force was divided into ten troops of fifty droids each. Each troop had one unit designated as a "[[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]]," and the other droids in the troop were modified on the cognitive level to make them more compliant to orders.<ref name="EGTD" />

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Rebellion]]'' {{1st}}
